case_title: GUERIN JEREMIAH J. VS THE TRAVELERS INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,207.94 FILED BY GUERIN JEREMIAH J. AS TO DEFENDANT THE TRAVELERS INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUERIN JEREMIAH J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE TRAVELERS INSURANCE CO. $510.75 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-14-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
TODD L. LIANTBODY C/O TRAVELERS INS. CO. RETURNED SIGNED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THE TRAVELERS INSURANCE CO.
